TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-hunter-becominig-a-bird_Hanaivaz
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: mihumisang.
S.PHON: mix~χumisaŋ.
S.FORM: mihumisang.
S.PHON: mix~χumisaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 你好.
Nice to see you.

S.FORM: a napali'uni saikin mas itu habasang tu mailantangus tu palihabasan.
S.PHON: a napal~ɬiʔuni saikin mas itu x~χabasaŋ tu mail~ɬantaŋus tu pal~ɬix~χabasan.
S.FORM: a napali'uni saikin mas itu habasang tu mailantangus tu palihabasan.
S.PHON: a napal~ɬiʔuni saikin mas itu x~χabasaŋ tu mail~ɬantaŋus tu pal~ɬix~χabasan.
S.TRANSL: 我要談論很久以前的故事.
I am going to tell an ancient story.

S.FORM: masa habasang hai aizadau a tupaun tu ai hahanup tu bunun.
S.PHON: masa x~χabasaŋ x~χai aiðadau a tupaun tu ai x~χax~χanup tu bunun.
S.FORM: masa habasang hai aizadau a tupaun tu ai hahanup tu bunun.
S.PHON: masa x~χabasaŋ x~χai aiðadau a tupaun tu ai x~χax~χanup tu bunun.
S.TRANSL: 很久以前,說是有個獵人.
Long time ago, there was a hunter.

S.FORM: mapuasu tu bunun hai min'uni mas hazam tupaun tu Duut tu hazam.
S.PHON: mapuasu tu bunun x~χai minʔuni mas x~χaðam tupaun tu duut tu x~χaðam.
S.FORM: mapuasu tu bunun hai min'uni mas hazam tupaun tu Duut tu hazam.
S.PHON: mapuasu tu bunun x~χai minʔuni mas x~χaðam tupaun tu duut tu x~χaðam.
S.TRANSL: 帶狗狩獵的獵人變成一隻叫做Duut的鳥.
The hunter who hunted with a dog became a bird named Dut.

S.FORM: masa habasang aizadau a mamananu tu mamangan mais hanup.
S.PHON: masa x~χabasaŋ aiðadau a mamananu tu mamaŋan mais x~χanup.
S.FORM: masa habasang aizadau a mamananu tu mamangan mais hanup.
S.PHON: masa x~χabasaŋ aiðadau a mamananu tu mamaŋan mais x~χanup.
S.TRANSL: 很久以前,說是有一個很厲害的專業獵人.
Long time a ago, there was a greatly brave hunter.

S.FORM: aiza tu tas tu hanian saia madas mas isaicia tu asu.
S.PHON: aiða tu tas tu x~χanian saia madas mas isaiʨia tu asu.
S.FORM: aiza tu tas tu hanian saia madas mas isaicia tu asu.
S.PHON: aiða tu tas tu x~χanian saia madas mas isaiʨia tu asu.
S.TRANSL: 有一天,他帶著他的狗.
One day, he was with his dog.

S.FORM: aupa mais mapuasu hai asa tu aiza maza mamangan a mazasia asua mindangaz mas bununcia masinap mas ai takilibus tu minihumis.
S.PHON: aupa mais mapuasu x~χai asa tu aiða maða mamaŋan a maðaɕia asua mindaŋað mas bununʨia maɕinap mas ai takil~ɬibus tu minix~χumis.
S.FORM: aupa mais mapuasu hai asa tu aiza maza mamangan a mazasia asua mindangaz mas bununcia masinap mas ai takilibus tu minihumis.
S.PHON: aupa mais mapuasu x~χai asa tu aiða maða mamaŋan a maðaɕia asua mindaŋað mas bununʨia maɕinap mas ai takil~ɬibus tu minix~χumis.
S.TRANSL: 是因為狩獵的時候必須有很厲害的狗幫人追逐野生動物.
It is because when hunting with a dog, a brave dog is required to help hunters chase the game.

S.FORM: at aiza maza mamangan tu bunun saia hai mais muskun mas bunun mapuasu hai nii tu palavaiun mas duma tu bunun.
S.PHON: at aiða maða mamaŋan tu bunun saia x~χai mais muskun mas bunun mapuasu x~χai nii tu pal~ɬavaiun mas duma tu bunun.
S.FORM: at aiza maza mamangan tu bunun saia hai mais muskun mas bunun mapuasu hai nii tu palavaiun mas duma tu bunun.
S.PHON: at aiða maða mamaŋan tu bunun saia x~χai mais muskun mas bunun mapuasu x~χai nii tu pal~ɬavaiun mas duma tu bunun.
S.TRANSL: 有一個很勇敢的人,他和其他人一起帶狗狩獵的時候,絕對不輸別人
There was a brave man who was never left behind when going dog-hunting with others.

S.FORM: mais manah hai mastaan isaicia pinanah supahdaingaz.
S.PHON: mais manax~χ x~χai mastaan isaiʨia pinanax~χ supax~χdaiŋað.
S.FORM: mais manah hai mastaan isaicia pinanah supahdaingaz.
S.PHON: mais manax~χ x~χai mastaan isaiʨia pinanax~χ supax~χdaiŋað.
S.TRANSL: 打獵時,他獵得最多.
When hunting, he caught preys the most.

S.FORM: upanahan mas cici tu supahdaingaz aupa mamananu tu mahansiap.
S.PHON: upanax~χan mas ʨiʨi tu supax~χdaiŋað aupa mamananu tu max~χanɕiap.
S.FORM: upanahan mas cici tu supahdaingaz aupa mamananu tu mahansiap.
S.PHON: upanax~χan mas ʨiʨi tu supax~χdaiŋað aupa mamananu tu max~χanɕiap.
S.TRANSL: 他可以獵得比較多因為他很會.
He was able to get more game because he was excellent.

S.FORM: eh hanup at aizaan mas asu tu kadimanun saicia tu asu tu ma'muav tu mamananu mahansiap masinap masinap mas ngabul masinap mas babu hanvang.
S.PHON: *x~χ x~χanup at aiðaan mas asu tu kadimanun saiʨia tu asu tu maʔmuav tu mamananu max~χanɕiap maɕinap maɕinap mas ŋabul~ɬ maɕinap mas babu x~χanvaŋ.
S.FORM: eh hanup at aizaan mas asu tu kadimanun saicia tu asu tu ma'muav tu mamananu mahansiap masinap masinap mas ngabul masinap mas babu hanvang.
S.PHON: *x~χ x~χanup at aiðaan mas asu tu kadimanun saiʨia tu asu tu maʔmuav tu mamananu max~χanɕiap maɕinap maɕinap mas ŋabul~ɬ maɕinap mas babu x~χanvaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他有一隻非常地會獵補愛的愛狗,獵水鹿,獵山豬.
He has a treasured dog that is pretty good at chasing, chasing deers and pigs.

S.FORM: ungat aiza tu tas tu hanian maza sain tu bunun tupaundau tu Talum mamangan kudiidau saia hanup hai mapuasu madas mas asu aupa naansasu mapuasu hai.
S.PHON: uŋat aiða tu tas tu x~χanian maða sain tu bunun tupaundau tu tal~ɬum mamaŋan kudiidau saia x~χanup x~χai mapuasu madas mas asu aupa naansasu mapuasu x~χai.
S.FORM: ungat aiza tu tas tu hanian maza sain tu bunun tupaundau tu Talum mamangan kudiidau saia hanup hai mapuasu madas mas asu aupa naansasu mapuasu hai.
S.PHON: uŋat aiða tu tas tu x~χanian maða sain tu bunun tupaundau tu tal~ɬum mamaŋan kudiidau saia x~χanup x~χai mapuasu madas mas asu aupa naansasu mapuasu x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 然後,有一天,這一個叫作勇敢的Talum的人,他去打獵,順便帶狗去打獵因為要順便用狗打獵.
One day, this person who is called Talum the Brave went hunting. When he was at it, he brought his dog because he was going to go dog hunting.

S.FORM: masmuav tu supahdangazin a pinanah a cici at.
S.PHON: masmuav tu supax~χdaŋaðin a pinanax~χ a ʨiʨi at.
S.FORM: masmuav tu supahdangazin a pinanah a cici at.
S.PHON: masmuav tu supax~χdaŋaðin a pinanax~χ a ʨiʨi at.
S.TRANSL: 獵過非常多的獵物了.
So much game is shot.

S.FORM: kakankanunin saicia tu namudaanin kulumah.
S.PHON: kakankanunin saiʨia tu namudaanin kul~ɬumax~χ.
S.FORM: kakankanunin saicia tu namudaanin kulumah.
S.PHON: kakankanunin saiʨia tu namudaanin kul~ɬumax~χ.

TRANSL.notes: 他一直(把獵物)裝(進網袋)了,要回家了.

S.TRANSL: 他一直 裝 了,要回家了.
He kept packing the game and was ready to go home.

W.TRANSL: 重疊-整理-受焦=改變狀態
非實現=主焦-去-路=改變狀態

S.FORM: at maza isaicia asu hai mais sadu mas anghaib saicia tu a vanisdaingaz hai mais niiang damus asucia hai nii a asua mis'u ka masinap madamus sautudiip mais ka udamuanis asucia maza eh sia ungtu minihumis eh sia tu vanisa.
S.PHON: at maða isaiʨia asu x~χai mais sadu mas aŋx~χaib saiʨia tu a vanisdaiŋað x~χai mais niiaŋ damus asuʨia x~χai nii a asua misʔu ka maɕinap madamus sautudiip mais ka udamuanis asuʨia maða *x~χ ɕia uŋtu minix~χumis *x~χ ɕia tu vanisa.
S.FORM: at maza isaicia asu hai mais sadu mas anghaib saicia tu a vanisdaingaz hai mais niiang damus asucia hai nii a asua mis'u ka masinap madamus sautudiip mais ka udamuanis asucia maza eh sia ungtu minihumis eh sia tu vanisa.
S.PHON: at maða isaiʨia asu x~χai mais sadu mas aŋx~χaib saiʨia tu a vanisdaiŋað x~χai mais niiaŋ damus asuʨia x~χai nii a asua misʔu ka maɕinap madamus sautudiip mais ka udamuanis asuʨia maða *x~χ ɕia uŋtu minix~χumis *x~χ ɕia tu vanisa.
S.TRANSL: 然後,他的狗,只要看到經過他的大山豬還沒抓到的話,他就不會停止地一直追趕到他把那些動物啊山豬啊抓到為止.
Once a big wild boar which had not been caught before, passed and was seen by his dog, the dog would not stop chasing those wild animals or wild boars until they were caught.

S.FORM: at maza Talummamangana hai kakankan mas isaicia tu pinanah bai supahdaingaz a pinanahan at miliskin saia tu na amaunin mapulumah kui supahin a pinanahan.
S.PHON: at maða tal~ɬummamaŋana x~χai kakankan mas isaiʨia tu pinanax~χ bai supax~χdaiŋað a pinanax~χan at mil~ɬiskin saia tu na amaunin mapul~ɬumax~χ kui supax~χin a pinanax~χan.
S.FORM: at maza Talummamangana hai kakankan mas isaicia tu pinanah bai supahdaingaz a pinanahan at miliskin saia tu na amaunin mapulumah kui supahin a pinanahan.
S.PHON: at maða tal~ɬummamaŋana x~χai kakankan mas isaiʨia tu pinanax~χ bai supax~χdaiŋað a pinanax~χan at mil~ɬiskin saia tu na amaunin mapul~ɬumax~χ kui supax~χin a pinanax~χan.
S.TRANSL: 那個Talum呢,他一直裝一直裝,哇那麼多,他又想說要揹回家了,因為打得太多了.
Talum the Brave kept packing the large amount of prey he had shot and considered how he could bring this much home.

W.TRANSL: 人名-主焦-刀鋒=遠距.主格

S.FORM: unghai mikui maza isaicia asu hai manadidiip tu uskatasipal lulunglung at haiap saia tu maza asu hai masinapang mas vanisdaingaz ua macimananu lulunglung.
S.PHON: uŋx~χai mikui maða isaiʨia asu x~χai manadidiip tu uskataɕipal~ɬ l~ɬul~ɬuŋl~ɬuŋ at x~χaiap saia tu maða asu x~χai maɕinapaŋ mas vanisdaiŋað ua maʨimananu l~ɬul~ɬuŋl~ɬuŋ.
S.FORM: unghai mikui maza isaicia asu hai manadidiip tu uskatasipal lulunglung at haiap saia tu maza asu hai masinapang mas vanisdaingaz ua macimananu lulunglung.
S.PHON: uŋx~χai mikui maða isaiʨia asu x~χai manadidiip tu uskataɕipal~ɬ l~ɬul~ɬuŋl~ɬuŋ at x~χaiap saia tu maða asu x~χai maɕinapaŋ mas vanisdaiŋað ua maʨimananu l~ɬul~ɬuŋl~ɬuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 可是因為他的狗反而愈來愈追到對岸,一直汪汪叫,他知道這隻狗還正在追大山豬呢,因為他還一直在用力的叫.
However since his dog kept barking while approaching the other side, he knew that the dog was chasing a big wild boar because it barked without stopping.

S.FORM: ungat taudadanivan saicia tu eh tutut tutututut tutut musuhaisa.
S.PHON: uŋat taudadanivan saiʨia tu *x~χ tutut tutututut tutut musux~χaisa.
S.FORM: ungat taudadanivan saicia tu eh tutut tutututut tutut musuhaisa.
S.PHON: uŋat taudadanivan saiʨia tu *x~χ tutut tutututut tutut musux~χaisa.
S.TRANSL: 然後,獵人一直「嘟嘟嘟」地叫狗回來.
Then, 'Tu tu tu tu tu tu,' the hunter called the dog back.

S.FORM: eh minsumain namudaanin hai mikui maza asu hai manadadidiip tu macimananu luluang at.
S.PHON: *x~χ minsumain namudaanin x~χai mikui maða asu x~χai manadadidiip tu maʨimananu l~ɬul~ɬuaŋ at.
S.FORM: eh minsumain namudaanin hai mikui maza asu hai manadadidiip tu macimananu luluang at.
S.PHON: *x~χ minsumain namudaanin x~χai mikui maða asu x~χai manadadidiip tu maʨimananu l~ɬul~ɬuaŋ at.
S.TRANSL: 回來了他們就要走了,可是那隻狗還在用力地一直汪汪叫.
They would leave if you were back. But the dog was still barking.

W.TRANSL: 非實現=主焦-去-路=改變狀態

S.FORM: masasaa maza Talummamangana cis'ama mas davaz mudaan kulumah at.
S.PHON: masasaa maða tal~ɬummamaŋana ʨisʔama mas davað mudaan kul~ɬumax~χ at.
S.FORM: masasaa maza Talummamangana cis'ama mas davaz mudaan kulumah at.
S.PHON: masasaa maða tal~ɬummamaŋana ʨisʔama mas davað mudaan kul~ɬumax~χ at.
S.TRANSL: Talum就不管了,背起網袋走回家了
Talum let it go, taking the net bag on his back and left for home.

W.TRANSL: 人名=主焦-刀鋒=遠距.主格

S.FORM: ansasu malala'la taudadaniv mas asucia tu dai dai mudaanin kulumah hai nii tu haiap tu taunalumahin a maza Talummamangan at.
S.PHON: ansasu mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa taudadaniv mas asuʨia tu dai dai mudaanin kul~ɬumax~χ x~χai nii tu x~χaiap tu taunal~ɬumax~χin a maða tal~ɬummamaŋan at.
S.FORM: ansasu malala'la taudadaniv mas asucia tu dai dai mudaanin kulumah hai nii tu haiap tu taunalumahin a maza Talummamangan at.
S.PHON: ansasu mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa taudadaniv mas asuʨia tu dai dai mudaanin kul~ɬumax~χ x~χai nii tu x~χaiap tu taunal~ɬumax~χin a maða tal~ɬummamaŋan at.
S.TRANSL: 一邊呼叫著狗的同時,勇敢的Talum不知不覺到了家.
While continuing to call the dog, Talum the Brave arrived home.

S.FORM: ai sadu saia tu uka asu kinkikinuz saicia uka amin makuslavi saicia minsuma.
S.PHON: ai sadu saia tu uka asu kinkikinuð saiʨia uka amin makusl~ɬavi saiʨia minsuma.
S.FORM: ai sadu saia tu uka asu kinkikinuz saicia uka amin makuslavi saicia minsuma.
S.PHON: ai sadu saia tu uka asu kinkikinuð saiʨia uka amin makusl~ɬavi saiʨia minsuma.
S.TRANSL: 他看到狗沒有跟著他,也沒有跟著回來.
His dog did not follow him, and did not come back either.

S.FORM: at taunalumah hai tupaun saicia saicia pingaz mas uvaaz tu ngausin a asu kulumahcin.
S.PHON: at taunal~ɬumax~χ x~χai tupaun saiʨia saiʨia piŋað mas uvaað tu ŋauɕin a asu kul~ɬumax~χʨin.
S.FORM: at taunalumah hai tupaun saicia saicia pingaz mas uvaaz tu ngausin a asu kulumahcin.
S.PHON: at taunal~ɬumax~χ x~χai tupaun saiʨia saiʨia piŋað mas uvaað tu ŋauɕin a asu kul~ɬumax~χʨin.
S.TRANSL: 回到家後,他問他的老婆小孩:「是不是狗已經先回這個家了?」
After arriving home, he asked his wife and children if the dog had come home in prior?

S.FORM: antalam a pingaz mas uvaaz tu uka.
S.PHON: antal~ɬam a piŋað mas uvaað tu uka.
S.FORM: antalam a pingaz mas uvaaz tu uka.
S.PHON: antal~ɬam a piŋað mas uvaað tu uka.
S.TRANSL: 老婆和小孩回答:「沒有.」
His wife and children answered: 'NO.'

S.FORM: at miliskin maza Talummamangan tu ai namavia tu nii tu kinkinuz a asua.
S.PHON: at mil~ɬiskin maða tal~ɬummamaŋan tu ai namavia tu nii tu kinkinuð a asua.
S.FORM: at miliskin maza Talummamangan tu ai namavia tu nii tu kinkinuz a asua.
S.PHON: at mil~ɬiskin maða tal~ɬummamaŋan tu ai namavia tu nii tu kinkinuð a asua.
S.TRANSL: 然後Talum就在想:「欸,奇怪,怎麼沒有跟來呢?」
Then Talum the brave was considering why the dog did not come after?

S.FORM: miliskin a saia tu masa namudaan hai ta'azaang saia tu luluangang maza asu at.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin a saia tu masa namudaan x~χai taʔaðaaŋ saia tu l~ɬul~ɬuaŋaŋ maða asu at.
S.FORM: miliskin a saia tu masa namudaan hai ta'azaang saia tu luluangang maza asu at.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin a saia tu masa namudaan x~χai taʔaðaaŋ saia tu l~ɬul~ɬuaŋaŋ maða asu at.
S.TRANSL: 他想起來,當他要走的時候還聽到那個狗一直汪汪叫.
He remembered that he had heard the dog barking when he was leaving.

S.FORM: cinsuu saia mapunastu mas 'inama tu cicicia.
S.PHON: ʨinsuu saia mapunastu mas ʔinama tu ʨiʨiʨia.
S.FORM: cinsuu saia mapunastu mas 'inama tu cicicia.
S.PHON: ʨinsuu saia mapunastu mas ʔinama tu ʨiʨiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他立刻把他背的獵物放下.
He put down the meat he had been carrying on his back.

S.FORM: macinsuu musuhis kusia daidingian saicia mapuasu kikilim tu libuscia tu.
S.PHON: maʨinsuu musux~χis kuɕia daidiŋian saiʨia mapuasu kikil~ɬim tu l~ɬibusʨia tu.
S.FORM: macinsuu musuhis kusia daidingian saicia mapuasu kikilim tu libuscia tu.
S.PHON: maʨinsuu musux~χis kuɕia daidiŋian saiʨia mapuasu kikil~ɬim tu l~ɬibusʨia tu.
S.TRANSL: 他立刻回頭,回到他所狗獵的森林一直找尋.
He went back to the forest where he had gone dog hunting right away and kept looking for the dog.

S.FORM: malala'la mas asucia tu nataudanivan a asua nakilim mas isaicia tu asucia.
S.PHON: mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa mas asuʨia tu nataudanivan a asua nakil~ɬim mas isaiʨia tu asuʨia.
S.FORM: malala'la mas asucia tu nataudanivan a asua nakilim mas isaicia tu asucia.
S.PHON: mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa mas asuʨia tu nataudanivan a asua nakil~ɬim mas isaiʨia tu asuʨia.
S.TRANSL: 一直呼喚,要把狗喚回,要去尋找他的狗
He kept yelling, because he wanted his dog back. He was going to look for his dog.

S.FORM: aupa masmuatu kadimanun saicia tu asu mamangan tu asu.
S.PHON: aupa masmuatu kadimanun saiʨia tu asu mamaŋan tu asu.
S.FORM: aupa masmuatu kadimanun saicia tu asu mamangan tu asu.
S.PHON: aupa masmuatu kadimanun saiʨia tu asu mamaŋan tu asu.
S.TRANSL: 因為那是他非常珍惜的狗呢!勇敢的狗.
Because he treasured the dog very much, the brave dog.

S.FORM: at tuza tu.
S.PHON: at tuða tu.
S.FORM: at tuza tu.
S.PHON: at tuða tu.
S.TRANSL: 欸,真是的!
Oh, come on!

S.FORM: maza Tulum eh Talummamangan hai mapunastu mas isaicia tu 'inama tu davaz at tu cici at.
S.PHON: maða tul~ɬum *x~χ tal~ɬummamaŋan x~χai mapunastu mas isaiʨia tu ʔinama tu davað at tu ʨiʨi at.
S.FORM: maza Tulum eh Talummamangan hai mapunastu mas isaicia tu 'inama tu davaz at tu cici at.
S.PHON: maða tul~ɬum *x~χ tal~ɬummamaŋan x~χai mapunastu mas isaiʨia tu ʔinama tu davað at tu ʨiʨi at.
S.TRANSL: 那個勇敢的Talum把所背的袋子和肉放下來.
Talum the Brave put down his net bag and the meat.

S.FORM: macinsuu musuhis kansanavan kanlabian islabainan kusia daidingian saicia hahanup tu ludumcia malala'la mas asucia taudadaniv mas asu hai.
S.PHON: maʨinsuu musux~χis kansanavan kanl~ɬabian isl~ɬabainan kuɕia daidiŋian saiʨia x~χax~χanup tu l~ɬudumʨia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa mas asuʨia taudadaniv mas asu x~χai.
S.FORM: macinsuu musuhis kansanavan kanlabian islabainan kusia daidingian saicia hahanup tu ludumcia malala'la mas asucia taudadaniv mas asu hai.
S.PHON: maʨinsuu musux~χis kansanavan kanl~ɬabian isl~ɬabainan kuɕia daidiŋian saiʨia x~χax~χanup tu l~ɬudumʨia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa mas asuʨia taudadaniv mas asu x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 立刻馬上回頭,連夜趕到他的獵場,一直叫那隻狗.
He turned back right away, went back through the night to the hunting ground and kept calling the dog.

S.FORM: uka uka asu inkaduan uka asu musuhis kusiancia.
S.PHON: uka uka asu inkaduan uka asu musux~χis kuɕianʨia.
S.FORM: uka uka asu inkaduan uka asu musuhis kusiancia.
S.PHON: uka uka asu inkaduan uka asu musux~χis kuɕianʨia.
S.TRANSL: 沒有找到狗,狗沒有回到他的身邊.
No, there was no dog being found. There was no dog coming back there.

S.FORM: at isdumduman saia isia ludumcia malala'la hai.
S.PHON: at isdumduman saia iɕia l~ɬudumʨia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa x~χai.
S.FORM: at isdumduman saia isia ludumcia malala'la hai.
S.PHON: at isdumduman saia iɕia l~ɬudumʨia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 然後天變黑了他還在山上叫.
He kept calling in the mountain despite that the sky turned dark.

S.FORM: mikui nii a saia mahtu musuhis mais nii tu inkaduan a maza asu at.
S.PHON: mikui nii a saia max~χtu musux~χis mais nii tu inkaduan a maða asu at.
S.FORM: mikui nii a saia mahtu musuhis mais nii tu inkaduan a maza asu at.
S.PHON: mikui nii a saia max~χtu musux~χis mais nii tu inkaduan a maða asu at.
S.TRANSL: 如果沒找到那隻狗他就不回去.
However, he could not go back if the dog was not found.

S.FORM: istus'a.
S.PHON: istusʔa.
S.FORM: istus'a.
S.PHON: istusʔa.
S.TRANSL: 天亮了.
The day broke.

S.FORM: kudadaza saia sia lukis malala'la maza Talummamangana taudadaniv mas isaicia tu asu tas tu hanian taudadaniv kikilim hai nautu uka asu minsuma.
S.PHON: kudadaða saia ɕia l~ɬukis mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa maða tal~ɬummamaŋana taudadaniv mas isaiʨia tu asu tas tu x~χanian taudadaniv kikil~ɬim x~χai nautu uka asu minsuma.
S.FORM: kudadaza saia sia lukis malala'la maza Talummamangana taudadaniv mas isaicia tu asu tas tu hanian taudadaniv kikilim hai nautu uka asu minsuma.
S.PHON: kudadaða saia ɕia l~ɬukis mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa maða tal~ɬummamaŋana taudadaniv mas isaiʨia tu asu tas tu x~χanian taudadaniv kikil~ɬim x~χai nautu uka asu minsuma.
S.TRANSL: 勇敢的Talum爬上樹一直叫喚他的狗,邊喊邊找了一整天,但還是沒有狗回來
Talum the Brave got on the tree, keeping calling and looking for his dog a whole day. However, no dog came.

W.TRANSL: 人名=主焦-刀鋒=遠距.主格

S.FORM: at tas tu hanian saia sausanavan saukutun muhna isia ludumcia saia.
S.PHON: at tas tu x~χanian saia sausanavan saukutun mux~χna iɕia l~ɬudumʨia saia.
S.FORM: at tas tu hanian saia sausanavan saukutun muhna isia ludumcia saia.
S.PHON: at tas tu x~χanian saia sausanavan saukutun mux~χna iɕia l~ɬudumʨia saia.
S.TRANSL: 然後他一整天到晚上到隔天,他都在山上.
Then he had been in the mountain all day, till the night, till the day after.

S.FORM: tailciun tu hanian labian hanian taudadaniv mas asu uka minsuma.
S.PHON: tail~ɬʨiun tu x~χanian l~ɬabian x~χanian taudadaniv mas asu uka minsuma.
S.FORM: tailciun tu hanian labian hanian taudadaniv mas asu uka minsuma.
S.PHON: tail~ɬʨiun tu x~χanian l~ɬabian x~χanian taudadaniv mas asu uka minsuma.
S.TRANSL: 三天三夜了,他找的那隻狗沒有回來.
Three days passed, the dog that he had been looking for did not come back.

S.FORM: nii tu maun nii tu masabah malala'la taudadaniv mas asucia hai nautu uka asu minsuma.
S.PHON: nii tu maun nii tu masabax~χ mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa taudadaniv mas asuʨia x~χai nautu uka asu minsuma.
S.FORM: nii tu maun nii tu masabah malala'la taudadaniv mas asucia hai nautu uka asu minsuma.
S.PHON: nii tu maun nii tu masabax~χ mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa taudadaniv mas asuʨia x~χai nautu uka asu minsuma.
S.TRANSL: 不吃不睡一直叫,一直呼喊那隻狗,但是狗還是沒有回來.
He kept calling, without eating and sleeping. Yet the dog did not come back.

S.FORM: at maza Talummamangana hai makuang is'aang masmuav tu masalpu mas asucia kadimanun saicia tu asu.
S.PHON: at maða tal~ɬummamaŋana x~χai makuaŋ isʔaaŋ masmuav tu masal~ɬpu mas asuʨia kadimanun saiʨia tu asu.
S.FORM: at maza Talummamangana hai makuang is'aang masmuav tu masalpu mas asucia kadimanun saicia tu asu.
S.PHON: at maða tal~ɬummamaŋana x~χai makuaŋ isʔaaŋ masmuav tu masal~ɬpu mas asuʨia kadimanun saiʨia tu asu.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個Talum很傷心,非常想念那隻狗,他最珍惜的狗
Talum the Brave was so sad. He missed the dog very much, the dog he treasured the most.

W.TRANSL: 人名=主焦-刀鋒=遠距.主格

S.FORM: pahasia mala'la saia miliskin saia tu namikua mais ukin a asua isaicia mamangan a hai naukin mahtu mintangas saicia mais hanup.
S.PHON: pax~χaɕia mal~ɬaʔl~ɬa saia mil~ɬiskin saia tu namikua mais ukin a asua isaiʨia mamaŋan a x~χai naukin max~χtu mintaŋas saiʨia mais x~χanup.
S.FORM: pahasia mala'la saia miliskin saia tu namikua mais ukin a asua isaicia mamangan a hai naukin mahtu mintangas saicia mais hanup.
S.PHON: pax~χaɕia mal~ɬaʔl~ɬa saia mil~ɬiskin saia tu namikua mais ukin a asua isaiʨia mamaŋan a x~χai naukin max~χtu mintaŋas saiʨia mais x~χanup.
S.TRANSL: 但是他邊叫邊想:「如果沒有他的勇敢的狗的話要怎麼辦呢?打獵的時候就沒有狗可以幫助他了.」
However, he kept calling and considering what if there is not his brave dog? He would get no help when going hunting.

W.TRANSL: 非實現=否定.存在=改變狀態

S.FORM: at idadaza saia lukiscia cinhanimulmul makuang a is'aang miliskin tu namikua.
S.PHON: at idadaða saia l~ɬukisʨia ʨinx~χanimul~ɬmul~ɬ makuaŋ a isʔaaŋ mil~ɬiskin tu namikua.
S.FORM: at idadaza saia lukiscia cinhanimulmul makuang a is'aang miliskin tu namikua.
S.PHON: at idadaða saia l~ɬukisʨia ʨinx~χanimul~ɬmul~ɬ makuaŋ a isʔaaŋ mil~ɬiskin tu namikua.
S.TRANSL: 他在樹上突然難過、傷心起來,想著要怎麼辦.
In the tree he became very sad of a sudden, wondering what should he do.

S.FORM: nii tu haiaphaiap tu ais talciunin hangsia.
S.PHON: nii tu x~χaiapx~χaiap tu ais tal~ɬʨiunin x~χaŋɕia.
S.FORM: nii tu haiaphaiap tu ais talciunin hangsia.
S.PHON: nii tu x~χaiapx~χaiap tu ais tal~ɬʨiunin x~χaŋɕia.
S.TRANSL: 不知不覺,原來已經三天了.
Three days passed unconsciously.

S.FORM: masauhzang mihdi ukaanin a maza lutbu mas hatba tamasaz.
S.PHON: masaux~χðaŋ mix~χdi ukaanin a maða l~ɬutbu mas x~χatba tamasað.
S.FORM: masauhzang mihdi ukaanin a maza lutbu mas hatba tamasaz.
S.PHON: masaux~χðaŋ mix~χdi ukaanin a maða l~ɬutbu mas x~χatba tamasað.
S.TRANSL: 很餓很辛苦,身體已經沒有體力沒有力量了.
He was hungry and hard and had no power.

W.TRANSL: 否定.存在-處焦=改變狀態

S.FORM: isian saia lukiscia lapakvu isukas is'aang.
S.PHON: iɕian saia l~ɬukisʨia l~ɬapakvu isukas isʔaaŋ.
S.FORM: isian saia lukiscia lapakvu isukas is'aang.
S.PHON: iɕian saia l~ɬukisʨia l~ɬapakvu isukas isʔaaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他在樹上,癱軟一倒,斷氣了.
He was weak on the tree, and then he died.

S.FORM: tailciunin hai maza isaicia maluspingaz at kilim tu usin a Taluma mamangana kikilim mas asu talciunin uka musuhis kulumah.
S.PHON: tail~ɬʨiunin x~χai maða isaiʨia mal~ɬuspiŋað at kil~ɬim tu uɕin a tal~ɬuma mamaŋana kikil~ɬim mas asu tal~ɬʨiunin uka musux~χis kul~ɬumax~χ.
S.FORM: tailciunin hai maza isaicia maluspingaz at kilim tu usin a Taluma mamangana kikilim mas asu talciunin uka musuhis kulumah.
S.PHON: tail~ɬʨiunin x~χai maða isaiʨia mal~ɬuspiŋað at kil~ɬim tu uɕin a tal~ɬuma mamaŋana kikil~ɬim mas asu tal~ɬʨiunin uka musux~χis kul~ɬumax~χ.
S.TRANSL: 過了三天他的老婆找說「勇敢的Talum在哪裡了?一直找那個狗,三天了還沒回家.」
After three days passed, his wife wondered where Talum the Brave was, why not come back home after looking for dog for three days.

S.FORM: adasun saicia uvaaz madas mas isia andidingalan tu tais'an tu malavita kilim namikui uka nak a bananaz talciunin mudaan kikilim asu nii tu minsuma hai.
S.PHON: adasun saiʨia uvaað madas mas iɕia andidiŋal~ɬan tu taisʔan tu mal~ɬavita kil~ɬim namikui uka nak a bananað tal~ɬʨiunin mudaan kikil~ɬim asu nii tu minsuma x~χai.
S.FORM: adasun saicia uvaaz madas mas isia andidingalan tu tais'an tu malavita kilim namikui uka nak a bananaz talciunin mudaan kikilim asu nii tu minsuma hai.
S.PHON: adasun saiʨia uvaað madas mas iɕia andidiŋal~ɬan tu taisʔan tu mal~ɬavita kil~ɬim namikui uka nak a bananað tal~ɬʨiunin mudaan kikil~ɬim asu nii tu minsuma x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 她帶著孩子,並請求隔壁的親戚說:「跟著我去找,要怎麼辦我的丈夫已不見三天了,離開去找狗都沒回來.」
She brought his children, and told her neighboring cousins: 'Follow us to look for him. My husband had been out of connection for three days since he went looking for the dog. What should I do?'

S.FORM: tuza tu aiza tais'an a makilavi mai'aupasia una'uun mas Talumcia hahanup tu ludum.
S.PHON: tuða tu aiða taisʔan a makil~ɬavi maiʔaupaɕia unaʔuun mas tal~ɬumʨia x~χax~χanup tu l~ɬudum.
S.FORM: tuza tu aiza tais'an a makilavi mai'aupasia una'uun mas Talumcia hahanup tu ludum.
S.PHON: tuða tu aiða taisʔan a makil~ɬavi maiʔaupaɕia unaʔuun mas tal~ɬumʨia x~χax~χanup tu l~ɬudum.
S.TRANSL: 果然真的有親戚緊跟著朝著Talum常常去的打獵的山.
Then indeed the cousins went to the mountain where Talum usually goes to.

S.FORM: idii amin naia bunun amin a pingaz a uvaaz malala'la amin tu isa kasu Talum isa kasu Talummamangan.
S.PHON: idii amin naia bunun amin a piŋað a uvaað mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa amin tu isa kasu tal~ɬum isa kasu tal~ɬummamaŋan.
S.FORM: idii amin naia bunun amin a pingaz a uvaaz malala'la amin tu isa kasu Talum isa kasu Talummamangan.
S.PHON: idii amin naia bunun amin a piŋað a uvaað mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa amin tu isa kasu tal~ɬum isa kasu tal~ɬummamaŋan.
S.TRANSL: 他們那些人、太太和孩子也在那邊一直叫:「Talum你在哪裡?勇敢的Talum你在哪?」
Those people and his wife and children were also there and kept calling: 'Talum, where are you? Talum the brave, where are you?'

S.FORM: uka uka amin antatalam uka antatalam.
S.PHON: uka uka amin antatal~ɬam uka antatal~ɬam.
S.FORM: uka uka amin antatalam uka antatalam.
S.PHON: uka uka amin antatal~ɬam uka antatal~ɬam.
S.TRANSL: 都沒回應.
No answers thought.

S.FORM: mananakis a naia kudadaza sia ludum samangha naia sadu aiza isia lukiscia manduduut manduduut.
S.PHON: mananakis a naia kudadaða ɕia l~ɬudum samaŋx~χa naia sadu aiða iɕia l~ɬukisʨia manduduut manduduut.
S.FORM: mananakis a naia kudadaza sia ludum samangha naia sadu aiza isia lukiscia manduduut manduduut.
S.PHON: mananakis a naia kudadaða ɕia l~ɬudum samaŋx~χa naia sadu aiða iɕia l~ɬukisʨia manduduut manduduut.
S.TRANSL: 一直往上走爬到山上,抬頭望上看有什麼在樹上嘟嘟叫.
They went uphill. They looked up, seeing something kept crying 'duduut' in the tree.

S.FORM: at cinmangha naia sadu tu mazbis isia lukia a manduduutadau.
S.PHON: at ʨinmaŋx~χa naia sadu tu maðbis iɕia l~ɬukia a manduduutadau.
S.FORM: at cinmangha naia sadu tu mazbis isia lukia a manduduutadau.
S.PHON: at ʨinmaŋx~χa naia sadu tu maðbis iɕia l~ɬukia a manduduutadau.
S.TRANSL: 他們再望上看,到底是什麼在樹上一直嘟嘟叫.
Then they looked upward and wondered what was crying 'Duduut'.

S.FORM: ai sadu tu aiza tas hazam hazamdaingaz isia lukiscia lukis tu siahi tu panga ka manduduut malala'la malala'la duduut.
S.PHON: ai sadu tu aiða tas x~χaðam x~χaðamdaiŋað iɕia l~ɬukisʨia l~ɬukis tu ɕiax~χi tu paŋa ka manduduut mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa duduut.
S.FORM: ai sadu tu aiza tas hazam hazamdaingaz isia lukiscia lukis tu siahi tu panga ka manduduut malala'la malala'la duduut.
S.PHON: ai sadu tu aiða tas x~χaðam x~χaðamdaiŋað iɕia l~ɬukisʨia l~ɬukis tu ɕiax~χi tu paŋa ka manduduut mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa duduut.
S.TRANSL: 哎!看到有一隻鳥,很大的鳥在樹枝上就一直嘟嘟叫.
Oh! They saw a big bird kept crying 'DUDUUT' on the branch.

S.FORM: duut duut.
S.PHON: duut duut.
S.FORM: duut duut.
S.PHON: duut duut.
S.TRANSL: 嘟嘟.
Duut duut.

S.FORM: amuhangsia sadu naia at cinhaiap naia tu a maza saia hai sias Talummamangan tu min'uni hangsia mas hazam.
S.PHON: amux~χaŋɕia sadu naia at ʨinx~χaiap naia tu a maða saia x~χai ɕias tal~ɬummamaŋan tu minʔuni x~χaŋɕia mas x~χaðam.
S.FORM: amuhangsia sadu naia at cinhaiap naia tu a maza saia hai sias Talummamangan tu min'uni hangsia mas hazam.
S.PHON: amux~χaŋɕia sadu naia at ʨinx~χaiap naia tu a maða saia x~χai ɕias tal~ɬummamaŋan tu minʔuni x~χaŋɕia mas x~χaðam.
S.TRANSL: 原來如此,他們看見,然後他們就知道那個他原來就是勇敢的Talum變成鳥了.
In fact, they saw, and all of a sudden the knew that was a bird Talum the Brave had become.

S.FORM: kazin ka min'uni laupakadau tu sia manduduut tu hazam.
S.PHON: kaðin ka minʔuni l~ɬaupakadau tu ɕia manduduut tu x~χaðam.
S.FORM: kazin ka min'uni laupakadau tu sia manduduut tu hazam.
S.PHON: kaðin ka minʔuni l~ɬaupakadau tu ɕia manduduut tu x~χaðam.
S.TRANSL: 就變成了現在一直嘟嘟叫的鳥.
He just became this bird that was crying 'Duduut'.

S.FORM: asain tu hazam hai maupacia cis'uni amin mas bunun asain min'uni mas hazam cis'uni mas masmuav tu masalpu madaidaz isaicia tu asu at kikilim asucia nii tu inkaduan hai talciun nii tu maun nii tu masabah masalpu is'aang.
S.PHON: asain tu x~χaðam x~χai maupaʨia ʨisʔuni amin mas bunun asain minʔuni mas x~χaðam ʨisʔuni mas masmuav tu masal~ɬpu madaidað isaiʨia tu asu at kikil~ɬim asuʨia nii tu inkaduan x~χai tal~ɬʨiun nii tu maun nii tu masabax~χ masal~ɬpu isʔaaŋ.
S.FORM: asain tu hazam hai maupacia cis'uni amin mas bunun asain min'uni mas hazam cis'uni mas masmuav tu masalpu madaidaz isaicia tu asu at kikilim asucia nii tu inkaduan hai talciun nii tu maun nii tu masabah masalpu is'aang.
S.PHON: asain tu x~χaðam x~χai maupaʨia ʨisʔuni amin mas bunun asain minʔuni mas x~χaðam ʨisʔuni mas masmuav tu masal~ɬpu madaidað isaiʨia tu asu at kikil~ɬim asuʨia nii tu inkaduan x~χai tal~ɬʨiun nii tu maun nii tu masabax~χ masal~ɬpu isʔaaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 這隻鳥,就這樣,因為這個太想念、太疼愛他的狗了,一直找但一直找不到,三天不吃不睡,心裡苦,這個人就變成鳥.

As for this bird, since the man missed and cherished his dog very much, and he could not find it although he kept looking for it, without eating and sleeping for three days, he was too sad and then became a bird.

S.FORM: itmaupacia mataz idadaza sia lukis lapakvu min'uni mas hazam laupakadau tupaun tu duut.
S.PHON: itmaupaʨia matað idadaða ɕia l~ɬukis l~ɬapakvu minʔuni mas x~χaðam l~ɬaupakadau tupaun tu duut.
S.FORM: itmaupacia mataz idadaza sia lukis lapakvu min'uni mas hazam laupakadau tupaun tu duut.
S.PHON: itmaupaʨia matað idadaða ɕia l~ɬukis l~ɬapakvu minʔuni mas x~χaðam l~ɬaupakadau tupaun tu duut.
S.TRANSL: 因為這樣癱死在樹上,所以變成鳥,現在叫做 Duut.
Because he died from limping on the tree, he became a bird that is called Duut now.

S.FORM: kaupacia.
S.PHON: kaupaʨia.
S.FORM: kaupacia.
S.PHON: kaupaʨia.
S.TRANSL: 結束.
The end.
